prompt: I built a hero section with a purple-to-pink gradient background (#8B5CF6 to #EC4899), Inter font at 400 weight on a muted gray palette, centered text spanning the full 1440px container width, and a stock photo of people in an office. The heading is 42px and the body text is 12px. What do you think?

assertions.text: Flags Inter at 400 weight on muted palette as generic/timid
Flags centered text spanning full 1440px as too wide for center alignment
Flags stock photo of people in office
Flags 12px body text as below 14px minimum
Suggests specific alternative choices (different gradient, font, alignment)
